data.title: User Account Protection
data.description: Implements multiple layers of security to safeguard user accounts.

data.title: Content Moderation Algorithms
data.description: Uses automated and manual measures to manage user-generated content.
data.technical_spec: Deep learning algorithms and community guidelines enforcement.

data.title: Data Encryption
data.description: Ensures all data in transit and at rest is encrypted.
data.technical_spec: TLS protocols for data in transit, AES-256 encryption for data at rest.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Protection against Distributed Denial of Service attacks to maintain uptime.
data.technical_spec: Traffic analysis and content filtering systems.

data.title: Fraud Detection Systems
data.description: Monitors for unusual patterns indicating potential fraud.
data.technical_spec: Behavioral analytics and anomaly detection algorithms.
